title: In vitro infection of PBMCs with dengue and Zika virus
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a8is7","text":"This protocol details in vitro infection of human PBMCs with dengue/zika virus followed by multiparameter antibody labeling and data acquisition using CyTOF.The data using this protocol is available at ImmPort (immport.org) under study accession SDY1369.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Yujao Zhao
